text: T-018 research. We want to pitch energy-drink brands a CREATIVE CONTENT partnership (we make cinematic shoppable videos, product image galleries, branded micro-sites, and ORIGINAL background music — fast & cheap, AI-powered). Produce tasks/T-018/RESEARCH.md: (1) the RIGHT contact path for **Celsius** and **Alani Nu** (note Celsius acquired Alani Nu in 2025) — brand marketing / social / influencer-partnership roles or emails, press/partnership channels, LinkedIn search terms (NOT customer service). (2) A shortlist of 5-8 **accessible mid-size / DTC energy-drink brands** (more likely to say yes) + how to reach their marketing. (3) 2-3 real examples of how small creators/studios landed CPG brand content deals (the playbook). Commit + warroom-say.
